message: fix: guard transcript_line_count against regression on python error

files.patch:
@@ -140,7 +140,7 @@ fi
 
 # ---- Update transcript_line_count in state ----
 state_now=$(read_state "$session_id")
-if [ -n "$state_now" ] && [ "$new_line_count" != "$start_line" ]; then
+if [ -n "$state_now" ] && [ "$new_line_count" -gt "$start_line" ]; then
   updated=$(echo "$state_now" | jq --argjson lc "$new_line_count" '.transcript_line_count = $lc') || true
   [ -n "$updated" ] && write_state "$session_id" "$updated"
 fi
